notes: Complex search form with destination autocomplete, date picker (calendar widget), and guest/room selector dropdown. Heavy JS, A/B testing causes DOM variations. Cookie consent banner blocks interaction. Multiple CTAs compete for attention.

endpoints.label: Accommodation Search Form
endpoints.description: Primary search: destination input with autocomplete, check-in/check-out date pickers, guests/rooms selector, and search button

endpoints.label: Property Type Tabs
endpoints.description: Header tabs: Stays, Flights, Flight+Hotel, Car Rentals, Attractions, Airport Taxis

endpoints.label: Sign In / Register
endpoints.description: Header sign-in button opening auth modal or redirect

endpoints.label: Cookie Consent Banner
endpoints.description: GDPR cookie consent with Accept/Manage buttons — blocks page until dismissed

endpoints.label: Trending Destinations
endpoints.description: Cards/links to popular destination cities below the search form

endpoints.label: Currency/Language Selector
endpoints.description: Header buttons for changing currency and language preferences
